commit.message:
docs: add planning docs and update progress

Add component audit, refactoring plan, and theme study documents.
Remove unused frontend container from docker-compose (runs locally).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: restrict group collapse/expand to chevron click only

Prevent accidental collapse when clicking elsewhere on the group
header (e.g. after editing a cell). Only the chevron arrow button
triggers toggle now.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

design: minimal type-aware empty states for all editable cells

Replace verbose "Cliquer pour modifier..." with quiet type-specific
indicators: dash for text/number, persistent icons for date/phone/
email/location, muted User icon without text, "—" for empty selects.
Icons always visible as anchors so empty→filled transition is smooth.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

refactor: replace DossierFilters with ColumnFilters on dossiers page

Extract matchesFilter to shared utility, update dossiers page to use
the same per-column filtering system as board pages. Remove old
DossierFilters component (status + date range only) in favor of
ColumnFilters (type-aware operators for all column types).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

design: add dark/light theme system with next-themes

Install next-themes, add ThemeProvider + ThemeToggle, define CSS
design tokens for both modes in globals.css, migrate ~1500 hardcoded
colors to semantic tokens across all components. Sidebar is light in
light mode, dark navy in dark mode. All color-coded elements (badges,
file types, status indicators) use dark: variants.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Rename package from com.notification to org.notification

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix Grafana dashboard by setting datasource UID and enabling histogram metrics

Dashboard panels referenced datasource uid "prometheus" but the
provisioned datasource had no explicit UID. Also enabled percentiles
histogram for HTTP server requests so p95/p99 latency panels have data.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix Redis cache serialization by using JSON instead of JDK serializer

The default JdkSerializationRedisSerializer requires cached objects to
implement Serializable. Entity classes (User, Device, NotificationTemplate)
don't, causing every @Cacheable call to fail with SerializationException
and resulting in 100% load test failures. Switch to
GenericJackson2JsonRedisSerializer. Also promote load-client error
logging from DEBUG to ERROR for better visibility.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Replace wildcard imports with explicit single-class imports

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add healthcheck to notification-server for load-client readiness

The load-client was starting before the notification-server Spring Boot
app was ready, causing 100% request failures. Use actuator health
endpoint as healthcheck and require service_healthy condition.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix Docker build by generating per-service settings.gradle

Each Dockerfile was copying the shared settings.gradle which references
all subprojects, but only one subproject's source was available during
build. Generate a minimal settings.gradle with only the target subproject.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

GEMINI-RDM-016: AF_XDP Go bridge (completed)

  decide' error
- Pass AgentInfo(agent_id=...) instead of dict to add_agent()

All three Stream 2 items [x]:

- XDP_REDIRECT prototype (src/network/ebpf/experimental/)
- AF_XDP RFC + Go bridge (docs/research/RFC_AF_XDP_INTEGRATION.md)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat(horizon-2): XDP_REDIRECT prototype + AF_XDP bridge + hardware spec

Stream 2 — Performance Campaign (post-GA):
- src/network/ebpf/experimental/xdp_redirect_prototype.c: BPF program
  using BPF_MAP_TYPE_DEVMAP + bpf_redirect_map to bypass kernel stack
  for mesh transit traffic on MESH_PORT 26969; per-CPU perf_stats counters
- src/network/ebpf/experimental/afxdp_bridge.go: Go bridge prototype
  linking to pinned XSKMAP; UMEM allocation pending i40e/ixgbe hardware
- docs/research/HORIZON2_HARDWARE_SPEC.md: dual-NIC testbed spec
  (Intel X710-DA2 / X520-DA2 / mlx5), DAC cable topology, pktgen setup
- docs/research/RFC_AF_XDP_INTEGRATION.md: XDP_REDIRECT + AF_XDP RFC,
  XSKMAP design, zero-copy vs copy-mode, Go integration, honest gate:
  1M+ PPS requires Native XDP on i40e/ixgbe, not achievable on virtio

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

src/network/ebpf/experimental/ and docs/research/ added to gemini's
ownership for XDP_REDIRECT and AF_XDP prototype work.

commit.message:
feat(release): add v1.1_GA_MANIFEST.json — official GA freeze artifact

Assembles the VERIFIED / VERIFIED IN CI / NOT CLAIMED boundary:
- VERIFIED: eBPF 49RX/142k TX + 99.8M/s Go-level, 5G E2E VPS, Ghost
  Protocol, PQC FIPS 203/204, Zero-Trust SPIRE, CI keyless provenance
  (run 22822503867), MaaS 10k+ unit tests
- VERIFIED IN CI: Rekor transparency log, MTTR synthetic baseline
  (MTTD=10.6s MTTR=52.7s), Go dataplane bench gate
- NOT CLAIMED: 1M+ PPS hardware, 24h soak, K8s CNI, carrier-grade 5G,
  Rekor log indices
- Open: GA-001 K8s CNI, GA-002 Rekor indices
- v1.1_GA_READINESS.md: keyless signing → VERIFIED, soak test documented,
  GA Freeze verdict declared, freeze commit referenced

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat(release): update v1.1_GA_READINESS — keyless signing verified, soak test documented

- keyless signing promoted from "CI Only" to "VERIFIED" (run 22822503867)
- 24h soak test and K8s CNI validation listed as NOT CLAIMED with honest detail
- GA Freeze verdict with freeze commit ff6e964351c4d717ab92a85a2b7a29edae42612c

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

chore(plan): mark CI Keyless Attestation as completed in RC1.1 backlog

Stream 1 fully done: Rekor log verification, provenance bundle freeze,
and CI keyless attestation all [x] as of 2026-03-08.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

chore(release): update RC1_EVIDENCE_BUNDLE — keyless attestation done

signing_mode=ci-keyless, ci_keyless_status=completed, 7 provenance
certificates listed, oidc_subject_pattern corrected to x0tta6bl4-ai
org, ci_run_id=22822503867 (2026-03-08).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix(ci): skip provenance push on protected main branch

main has branch protection (requires Security Scan Summary).
Skip the commit/push step when triggered from main; provenance
artifacts are needed only on release/rc1 for the release bundle.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix(ci): push provenance to triggering branch, not hardcoded main

main is protected (requires Security Scan Summary status check).
Use git push origin HEAD:${{ github.ref_name }} so the provenance
commit lands on release/rc1 when triggered from that branch.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix(ci): use GITHUB_WORKFLOW_REF for keyless verify-blob identity

The hardcoded --certificate-identity referenced the wrong org
(x0tta6bl4 vs x0tta6bl4-ai) and wrong workflow file (ci.yml vs
ebpf-release-signing.yml). Use GITHUB_WORKFLOW_REF which GitHub
Actions sets automatically to the exact subject embedded in the
keyless OIDC certificate.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Switch to builds+routes Vercel config, Express serves all routes

- vercel.json: use builds+routes with server.ts as single entry point
- server.ts: enable static file serving in all prod environments

commit.message:
Fix dock pill positioning & align icon/color values to Pencil design specs (v1.0.8)

Pill was overlapping the Obsidian mobile dock bar due to hardcoded bottom offset.
Now measures actual dock element at runtime and repositions dynamically on layout
changes. Also corrects 18 CSS property mismatches (icon sizes, colors, padding, gap)
and restructures the upload bottom sheet DOM to match the design (handle bar,
description, music icon container, check-circle, sparkles CTA).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix git push failure - ensure main branch is checked out

The previous version used 'git reset --hard origin/main' which left
the repo in detached HEAD state. This prevented pushes from working.

Now we:
1. Checkout main branch (create if needed)
2. Reset to match origin/main

This ensures git push commands work properly from the Docker container.

Fixes: 'error: src refspec main does not match any'

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: gate mei_kanji prefill on signed status — unsigned items have attributed maker, not inscription

85.3% of unsigned catalog items have gold_mei_kanji populated with the
attributed maker's name (e.g., "正宗"), not a physical inscription.
Prefilling this into the inscription field would mislead dealers into
misrepresenting mumei blades as having text on the tang.

commit.message:
Add enhanced auto-detection, monorepo support, AI config migration, and dependency drift

Four new features for existing project onboarding:
- Enhanced auto-detection: commands (test/lint/dev/build/migrate from package.json/Makefile/pyproject.toml), git platform, CI/CD, hosting
- Monorepo support: Turborepo, Nx, pnpm/yarn workspaces, Lerna detection with workspace-aware rules
- AI config migration: .cursorrules, copilot-instructions.md, .windsurfrules → .claude/rules/migrated-*.md
- Dependency drift: snapshot deps during --analyze, audit flags significant package changes

375 tests (47 new), all passing.

feat: prefetch lead detail on hover for instant navigation

When user hovers over a lead card for 150ms, the 4 lead-specific
queries start loading in background. When they click, the detail
page uses the prefetched data instead of making fresh queries.

- Module-level prefetch cache with 30s TTL and auto-cleanup
- Debounced hover (150ms) prevents query spam during scrolling
- Click also triggers prefetch as fallback for quick taps
- cargarLeadData checks cache first, falls through to fresh fetch

commit.message:
Drag fiscal capi : corriger base/valeur dans le calcul du rendement net

Le forfait TME s'applique sur la base (versements nets), pas sur la valeur (encours).
Le drag en % de la valeur diminue quand les gains s'accumulent. Utilise le ratio
base/valeur estimé à l'objectif (projAtObjectif) au lieu de traiter le drag capi
comme un % de la valeur — corrige une surestimation ~1.8x à horizon 14 ans.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix Google Places field mask: replace invalid servesFood with servesLunch/servesDinner

Google Places API (New) has no servesFood field — use servesLunch and servesDinner
instead. Update PlaceDetails type and PubTags to derive "Serves food" from both.

commit.message:
fix: rebalance confirm, deposit/spend flow, re-tag account selection, live slice refresh

- RebalanceModalContent: fix Confirm button disabled when candidates not yet
  loaded (was silently no-op); derive modalMode from modal.type not payload.mode
- Deposit/Spend: add account picker + delta input as phase 1; pass selected
  accountId into fetchCandidates so dvId=0 bug is gone
- executePurposeTransfer: replace drain-largest-first with explicit per-account
  transfers [{accountDvId, amount}]
- PurposeTransferModalContent: 2-phase flow — select source/target purposes,
  then show account slice grid for user to specify amounts per account
- loadState: re-fetches slice cache for all expanded rows so they update
  in-place after any mutation (no spinner flash); remove invalidateSliceCache()
  calls from all modal confirm handlers
- BalanceHeader: add paddingTop; seed fund name changed to 'Total Amount'

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix Japanese filename handling in ingest_local_folder

The safeName regex replaced all non-ASCII characters (including
Japanese) with underscores, causing filenames to lose their
original names and potentially collide. Now only control characters
are stripped, preserving Unicode filenames.

Fixes #7

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

TDD: fix path prefix matching boundary and feedback stats double-counting

- config.rs, rules.rs: path_matches now checks path component boundaries
  so pattern "src" won't incorrectly match "srcfoo/file.rs"
- misc.rs: extract feedback accept/reject into testable functions and
  only increment stats when comment ID is newly inserted (fixes
  double-counting when same comment is accepted/rejected multiple times)

commit.message:
Fix audio export to match real-time playback

- Add harmonic overtones to binaural export (fundamental + 2nd/3rd harmonics)
- Fix synth tone types: soft=triangle+LP(1000Hz,Q=3), bright=sawtooth+LP(1100Hz,Q=2)
- Fix volume scaling: layer.volume directly (no *0.5), 1/sqrt(N) master gain
- Fix tremolo: sine mode depth, decay mode anchor points and timing
- Add nature sound support to synth export (was completely missing)
- Support custom audio (IndexedDB) in both binaural and synth export
- Add 0.5s fade-in matching real-time NaturePlayer behavior

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Remove duplicate Book schema and LocalBusiness, align og:description

- Remove standalone Book schema (duplicate of @graph Book, had
  inconsistent reviewCount). Consolidated to single @graph Book
  with reviewCount: 5, added publisher and sameAs entity links.
- Remove LocalBusiness schema (inappropriate for a book website,
  could be flagged as spam by Google)
- Align og:description with meta description on introduction.html
  and chapter1.html

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
test: コンパニオンオブジェクト+Result型パターンに全テストを対応

- MockStore, FileSystemStoreをcompanion object (create())に変換
- new Class() → Class.create() に統一
- DeltaTable.open等の成功ケースをResult.unwrap()で取得
- エラーケースをResult.isErr() + error.typeで検証
- DeltaAction DUに合わせてfilter/accessパターンを更新 (a.commitInfo → a.type === 'commitInfo')
- 全113テストパス確認

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: store per-mode proxy aliases on agents for local/remote drawlatch configs

Previously mcpKeyAlias was a single field — switching proxy modes lost the
alias or showed one from the wrong pool. Now agents store mcpKeyAliasLocal
and mcpKeyAliasRemote independently, with mcpKeyAlias resolved at read time
based on the active proxy mode. Legacy agents are migrated on first save.

commit.message:
Add ranking filters, offline fix, forfeit logic, lobby image, i18n cleanup

- Offline match: fix isHumanTurn (local mode always true), add confirm button
- Matchmaking: delete-first pattern so Cloud Function onDocumentCreated fires
- Leave game: immediate forfeit (opponent wins), old rejoin logic preserved in comments
- Rankings: sort by win rate or wins count; period filter (week/month/year/all)
- Lobby: add Connect 6 board SVG feature image
- Translations: rename "Connect Six" → "Connect 6" throughout
- cleanup_zero_games.mjs: script to remove 0-game leaderboard entries (ran: deleted 42)
- test_full.mjs: end-to-end Playwright test script (offline match + matchmaking + game)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Migrate Android Core Logic to Rust Engine (#160)

* Migrate Android core logic to Rust (nostr-sdk + nostrdb)

This commit implements a major architectural shift, moving heavy Nostr
logic (networking, caching, and recommendation scoring) from Kotlin to
a shared Rust core via UniFFI.

Key changes:
- Centralized nostrdb (LMDB) management in Rust.
- Ported the X-algorithm inspired recommendation engine to the core.
- Implemented NIP-55 External Signer flow bridging Kotlin and Rust.
- Added a Hybrid toggle in NostrRepository for safe rollout.
- Aligned Android build to Java 17 for UniFFI compatibility.
- Generated stable Kotlin bindings using a unified UDL interface.

Co-authored-by: tami1A84 <123137351+tami1A84@users.noreply.github.com>

* Finalize Rust Core migration and verify tests on Pop!_OS

- Integrated Rust core with nostrdb and recommendation engine.
- Implemented NIP-55 external signer bridge.
- Verified all core logic tests pass.
- Successfully built Android APK with shared native libraries.

Co-authored-by: tami1A84 <123137351+tami1A84@users.noreply.github.com>

* Migrate Android Core Logic to Rust (Macro-based UniFFI)

This commit completes the transition of heavy Nostr logic from Kotlin to a shared Rust core.
It establishes a robust, future-proof architecture using pure UniFFI attribute macros.

Key accomplishments:
- Removed legacy .udl files in favor of #[uniffi::export] for better maintainability.
- Centralized nostrdb (LMDB) management as a global Rust singleton.
- Implemented a Hybrid "Parallel Pilot" rollout in NostrRepository with fallback logic.
- Supported NIP-55 External Signer flow by bridging Kotlin signing with Rust event creation.
- Verified scoring algorithm (Engagement x Social x TimeDecay) with unit tests.
- Aligned project to Java 17 for seamless Android integration.

Co-authored-by: tami1A84 <123137351+tami1A84@users.noreply.github.com>

* fix: ExternalSigner (Amber) write ops — npub→hex, publishNote, JSON decode

- Fix all write operations for Amber (NIP-55) users:
  - loginWithAmber: normalize npub bech32→hex before storing
  - NuruNuruApp: migrate stored npub→hex at startup
  - NostrRepository.myPubkeyHex: on-read normalization (defense-in-depth)
- Add ExternalSigner path for publishNote (kind 1):
  - createUnsignedEvent → signEvent (Amber Intent) → publishRawEvent
  - Fix JSON decode: use json (ignoreUnknownKeys=true) instead of default Json
- Add auto-sign permissions to createGetPublicKeyIntent (NIP-55)
- Add signAndPublish helper used by all write ops (react, repost, follow, etc.)
- Add diagnostic logging for signing flow (Intent fallback, onResult)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Fix social media audit crash: escape ADK template variables in prompts

ADK interprets {variable_name} in static instruction strings as context
variables to interpolate from session state. The social researcher prompt
had {business_name}, {competitor_name}, and {handle} as example search
query placeholders, causing "Context variable not found" errors. Replaced
with BUSINESS_NAME, COMPETITOR_NAME, HANDLE literals.
